headline: A Look At Citizens Financial Group (CFG) Valuation After Sector Rally On Expanding Net Interest Margins
summary: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) stock moved higher after a sector wide rally in financials, as regional banks drew interest from investors focused on expanding net interest margins, supported by easing deposit costs and still elevated loan yields. See our latest analysis for Citizens Financial Group. Beyond the latest move, Citizens Financial Group has seen a steady pattern of gains, with a 90 day share price return of 9.72% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 59.66%, suggesting momentum...
